status: Active development — new features and refactoring in progress

items.title: feat(sidebar): implement tab bar UI with drag, pin, and context menu
feat(data): add Tag entity DataApi with CRUD and entity-tag associations
feat: migrate agents storage to v2 main database
feat(ai): add V2 AI streaming pipeline and blocks-to-parts migration
feat(migration): migrate llm model preferences to v2 with UniqueModelId format
refactor: migrate shortcut system to Preference architecture
feat(v2): add main-side file processing backend
feat(backup): add v2 backup system refactor plan document
feat: add v2 painting data foundation

highlights: #13851 feat(v2): decouple assistant from topic with dedicated table and migration
#14115 feat(data): provider/model data migration and registry service
#13954 feat(sidebar): rewrite sidebar with Tailwind/shadcn UI and fix missing routes
#14147 refactor: replace HTTP MCP proxy with in-memory SDK transport
#12474 feat(tabs): implement browser-like tab system with detach/attach support

active_work_areas: Data layer migration (provider/model, LLM preferences, assistant-topic decoupling)
Agents storage migration to main DB
note: main branch is under code freeze. Only hotfix/* accepted to main. All new features go to v2.
